abilities.description: Marci grabs an allied or enemy target and throws it effortlessly behind her, damaging and slowing the unit if it's an enemy. Any enemy units in the landing area will also be damaged and slowed.
params: Passive Component[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Number of Unleash Pulses: 1[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Pulse Silence Duration: 1
abilities.name: Dispose
abilities.story: Marci excels at removing obstacles from Princess Mirana's path.

abilities.description: Vector targeted. Marci bounds to the targeted unit, choosing a direction and distance she will spring away from it. Upon reaching the unit, Marci lunges to her final destination, damaging and stunning enemies in the area. The ally receives 25%/30%/35%/40% bonus movement speed for 5s.
params: Passive Component[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Number of Unleash Pulses: 1[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Pulse Silence Duration: 1
abilities.name: Rebound
abilities.story: With a friendly or brazen boost, Marci can find her way into the midst of any fight.

abilities.description: Marci's loyalty helps ensure survival, imbuing a chosen allied hero and herself with shared lifesteal and attack damage. If Marci and her ally are further apart from each other than 2500, the ally receives no bonuses and Marci only gets 0.5 until they get close again. Marci's lifesteal also heals her ally and the ally lifesteal also heals Marci.
params: Passive ComponentSelf Bonus Factor: 0.5[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Number of Unleash Pulses per Ally: 1[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Pulse Silence Duration: 1
[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Number of Unleash Pulses per Ally: 1
abilities.name: Sidekick
abilities.story: Marci learned at a young age that the best asset in a scrap is a steady companion.

abilities.description: Marci protects an allied hero. For 6s, whenever the ally attacks or is attacked by an enemy, Marci counter-attacks that target if they are within her attack range plus 125. The ally also gains bonus armor for the duration. Passively grants Marci lifesteal and bonus attack damage.
params: Passive ComponentBuff Duration: PermanentPulse Silence Duration:
[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Number of Unleash Pulses per Ally: 1
abilities.name: Bodyguard

abilities.description: Marci taps a hidden power, gaining Fury charges that allow her to deliver a rapid sequence of strikes. The last strike in every Fury combo creates a damaging pulse around the target that slows movement and attack speed for 2s. In between Fury combos, Marci is unable to attack for 1.5s. Marci gains 15% movement speed when Unleash is cast.
params: Flurry Target Base Attack Speed Slow: 60/80/100
abilities.name: Unleash
abilities.story: Though some have sought to understand its origins, Marci rebuffs all attempts to divine the source of her power.

description: Dashes around pummeling enemies with rapid attacks. Proving that undying loyalty yields unrivaled power, Marci always marches into battle ready to raise fists in defense of her companions. Effortlessly Disposing friends and foes around the battlefield. With a friendly or brazen boost, she happily finds her way into the midst of any fight. Using allies as an anchor, she Rebounds into and out of any brawl with deadly speed, dauntlessly deterring against harming any she deems friend. Those who attempt to undermine her stature, or as Princess Mirana's rookie Sidekick, will be single-targetly crushed as she Unleashes a hidden power strong enough to make even gods reconsider the wisdom of a hostile path.  Support Carry Initiator Disabler Escape  Cape, Cute, Female, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Marci first debuted in the Dota: Dragon's Blood series and her appearance was designed in cooperation with Studio Mir, the producing studio behind the series.
